title: Guide to Individuals Seated on the Senate Dais
summary: The Senate meets in the Senate chamber of the Capitol. Seated at the head of the chamber on the top of a two-tiered dais is the presiding officer. Members are assigned to the 100 desks that are arranged in a semicircle facing the presiding officer. The center aisle in the Senate chamber divides the political parties. Facing the presiding officer, Republicans sit to the right of the center aisle, Democrats to the...

title: Guide to Individuals Seated on the House Dais
summary: The House of Representatives meets in the House chamber of the Capitol. In the front of the chamber is a three-tiered, elevated dais. Members of the House sit in bench-style unassigned seats arranged in a semicircle facing the presiding officer. Facing the dais, Republicans...

title: DOJ threatens to arrest state election officials if noncitizens vote

But in this milestone year, President Trump's approach to commemorating the anniversary has injected a more partisan tone into events meant to bring Americans together. Liz Landers reports from the fair.

title: Immigration judge says Trump administration's firings and policies are 'disheartening'
summary: The Trump administration has fired more immigration judges as it moves to reshape the court system that polices deportations.
